note: This manifest was INFERRED by reading existing committed parquet metadata (pyarrow row counts), not produced by an explicit `python scripts/prepare_data.py --sample-rows ...` run. The committed data/processed/*.parquet files are a 50,000-row-per-file slice of the full Bosch CSVs (data/raw/*.csv has the full ~1.18M-row files). This 50k slice predates the --sample-rows/--sample-tag CLI flags and the automatic provenance-writing added to scripts/prepare_data.py; it was historically produced as a stale/partial artifact (see data/README.md and docs/reproducible_metrics_report.md for the full 'two worlds' explanation). Treat sample_tag='stale-partial-committed-dev-sample' as a label of how this file currently in the repo came to exist, not an endorsement that it was generated by an intentional, reproducible sampling run. Going forward, regenerate explicitly with --sample-rows 50000 --sample-tag dev --overwrite (or full data with no --sample-rows) so this manifest reflects a real run.
